callGraph.callee:
text
    .replace(/[(\s#]_?(Mandatory|Optional)_?([)\s#\n]|$)/gi, "") // Clean metadata suffixes
    .replace(/[\u{1F300}-\u{1F6FF}\u{1F900}-\u{1F9FF}\u{2600}-\u{26FF}\u{2700}-\u{27BF}]/gu, "") // Remove emojis
    .trim
